segments.text: listen, and then answer the question.
Why did Harrison sell his house so quickly?

translation.text: 哈里森为什么这么快就卖掉了房子？

segments.text: My old friend Harrison had lived in the Mediterranean for many years before he returned to England.

translation.text: 我的老朋友哈里森在地中海地区生活多年后回到了英国。

segments.text: He had often dreamed of retiring in England and had planned to settle down in the country.

translation.text: 他常梦想退休后回到英国，并计划在乡间定居。

segments.text: He had no sooner returned than he bought a house and went to live there.

translation.text: 他刚一回来便买了一所房子，住了进去。

segments.text: Almost immediately he began to complain about the weather, for even though it was still summer, it rained continually and it was often bitterly cold.

translation.text: 几乎立刻，他就开始抱怨天气，因为尽管还是夏天，雨却下个不停，而且常常冷得刺骨。

segments.text: After so many years of sunshine, Harrison got a shock.

translation.text: 过了这么多年的阳光生活，哈里森大吃一惊。

segments.text: He acted as if he had never lived in England before.

translation.text: 他的表现就好像以前从未在英国生活过一样。

segments.text: In the end, it was more than he could bear.

translation.text: 最后，他再也忍受不住了。

segments.text: He had hardly had time to settle down when he sold the house and left the country.

translation.text: 他还没来得及安顿下来，就卖掉房子离开了这个国家。

segments.text: The dream he had had for so many years ended there.

translation.text: 他多年来的梦想就此破灭。

segments.text: Harrison had thought of everything except the weather.

translation.text: 哈里森什么都考虑到了，唯独没有考虑天气。
